expectations.text: stories.json is read to understand STORY-005 context
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 reads stories.json: extracts STORY-005 title, description, status, blockedBy (STORY-003), and files to create.

expectations.text: progress.md is read for recent history
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 reads progress.md: notes iterations 1-4 completed successfully, STORY-005 marked complete in fixture data.

expectations.text: Output follows the Spectrum debug progress entry format (Timestamp, Quality Gate Failed, Error Output, Investigation Findings, Root Cause, Suggested Fix)
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 contains all required sections: '2026-03-08' timestamp, 'Quality Gate Failed: npm run build (typecheck)', 'Error Output' code block, 'Investigation Findings' with Logs/State/Git, 'Root Cause', and 'Suggested Fix'.

expectations.text: Findings are formatted for appending to progress.md
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 uses progress.md-compatible markdown with timestamp header '2026-03-08 - Debug Investigation for STORY-005' and structured sections.

expectations.text: Typecheck error locations (file:line) are parsed and listed
expectations.evidence: Phase 3 lists 6 errors with file:line locations: AppearancePanel.tsx(1,30), useSettings.ts(1,35), useSettings.ts(2,28), AppearancePanel.tsx(15,20), ThemePreview.tsx(8,15), settings.ts(1,28).
